scripts.package:check: node scripts/check-package-contracts.mjs && pnpm test:cli:lib && pnpm perf:graph:check && node --test scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.integration:cli:entry: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "^(metadata|command inventory|subcommand --help|help|top-level command typos|init)" cli/src/integration.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:unit: node --test mcp/src/analyze.test.mjs mcp/src/infer-imports.test.mjs mcp/src/omot-ignore.test.mjs mcp/src/compiled-cache.test.mjs mcp/src/ontology-compiler.test.mjs mcp/src/ontology-engine.test.mjs mcp/src/parser.test.mjs mcp/src/query.test.mjs mcp/src/validate.test.mjs mcp/src/vault.test.mjs mcp/src/redirect-backlinks.test.mjs mcp/src/conflict-detection.test.mjs mcp/src/json-rpc-lines.test.mjs
scripts.integration:mcp:write: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "^(add_concepts|add_concept/add_concepts|MCP slug conflicts|MCP write tools|add_relations|patch_concept|rename_concept|graph destructive writes|merge_concepts|delete_concept|add_relation)" mcp/src/integration.test.mjs
scripts.test:dogfood:script-refs: node --test scripts/lib/pnpm-script-refs.test.mjs scripts/lib/test-name-pattern.test.mjs scripts/run-focused-node-test.test.mjs && node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "filtered integration scripts discoverable" scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:dogfood: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "structuredContent|compile_ontology|tools/list|row-label guidance|batch cap|vault warnings|validate_vault problem|unhealthy first-contact|failing health checks|warn/fail next actions|malformed workspace_brief|malformed maintenance_plan payloads|remaining maintenance buckets|current-page maintenance next actions|stderr warnings|dogfood help|dogfood arguments|dogfood timeout|timeout failures|dogfood response labels|destructive dogfood dry-run|strict relation filters|strict add_relation|strict graph kind filter|strict closest-value smoke|malformed initialize|dogfood MCP docs explicit" scripts/dogfood-mcp-walk.test.mjs scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:dogfood:timeout: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "dogfood timeout|timeout failures|dogfood response labels|dogfood help|dogfood arguments" scripts/dogfood-mcp-walk.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:docs: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "root README honest|root README mcp-verify shortcut|MCP registration templates|MCP README explicit|MCP README aligned|MCP verify README aligned|CLI README explicit|CLAUDE.md a thin AGENTS wrapper|root README dogfood snapshot|self-ontology README census|Firebase static hosting|docs-vault freshness check|dogfood CLI capability|dogfood MCP docs|dogfood MCP capability|filtered integration scripts" scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:maintenance: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "maintenance filter|maintenance cursor|maintenance missing-cursor|maintenance ready-cursor|maintenance resume-cursor|malformed maintenance_plan payloads|remaining maintenance buckets|current-page maintenance next actions" mcp/src/verify-script.test.mjs scripts/dogfood-mcp-walk.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:package: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "MCP npm test|CLI npm test|allows only the parser smoke fixture|CLI MCP dependency|CLI entrypoint|CLI mcp-verify wrapper" scripts/check-package-contracts.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:suggestions: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "suggestions|suggests close enum values" mcp/src/suggestions.test.mjs mcp/src/ontology-engine.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:verify:first-contact: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "initialize instructions|strict unknown-tool|node-dependent first-contact|first-contact response labels|bootstrap and import-analysis|first-contact verify|destructive writer dry-run|patch_concept conflict guard|list_concepts reports vault warnings|validate_vault reports problem files|malformed validate_vault|first-contact diagnosis|health summary|health check advisories|failing health checks|workspace_brief growth count drift|workspace_brief next action sample drift|fail next actions" mcp/src/verify-script.test.mjs
scripts.test:mcp:verify:timeout: node scripts/run-focused-node-test.mjs --test-name-pattern "verify timeout|timeout failures|startup failures|direct verify usage|direct verify timeout|direct verify CLI args|empty verify vault" mcp/src/verify-script.test.mjs
